text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I spot Mejiro Ardan and Mejiro Ryan<n>as they're
finishing up practice at the<n>dance studio.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Are your legs okay, Ardan? How's<n>about we
spend the rest of our time<n>watching some
example videos?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hellooooo! Thanks for the other day,<n>Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know this song! It's a total<n>foot-fumbler.
Apparently, Yaeno's<n>struggling with it too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, even Yaeno's having difficulty<n>with this
song? But she's such an<n>adept dancer...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've got a great idea! ♪ Since there<n>are three of
us here, why don't we try<n>putting the
choreography for the two<n>sides and center
together?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Practice with the three of us, eh?<n>Sounds like fun,
but... How are your<n>legs, Ardan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, a single dance shouldn't hurt.<n>Besides, I'd
love to try it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Not only is this an excellent<n>opportunity for me to
dance with<n>Chiyono O, but we might just learn<n>
something that'll help Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah? Okay, let's get dancing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like a plan! So who's going to<n>dance
where?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Dance positions... Well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to be in the center. Would that<n>be all
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Your moves wereeven cleaner and sharper than usual,Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's because I allocate the<n>most time to
practicing in the center<n>position.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Really? I think I tend to put off center<n>
choreography practice...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It just sort of happens, since I might<n>not get the
chance to dance in the<n>center, even if I practice...
You really<n>impress me, Ardan. How do you stay<n>
motivated?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My wish is merely to strive for the<n>moment in
which I can shine my<n>brightest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Even if that moment only happens<n>once...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Should such an opportunity arise, I<n>couldn't
stand to let it pass me by,<n>so... that is my
motivation.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You want first place that badly, huh...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But you're right. If you're going to<n>race, you
have to race to win...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to win too! All right! Time for<n>me to do
some center dance practice<n>as well!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Impressive as ever, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, and that's what makes<n>Chiyono O, well,
Chiyono O. I'm sure<n>Yaeno feels much the same
way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I had a feeling, but... Chiyono O and<n>Yaeno really
are special to you, aren't<n>they?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Special? Well, yes. They're my<n>precious rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You know what? When the time<n>comes for you,
Chiyono O, and Yaeno<n>to race, I'll definitely be
there<n>watching!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My word, I think you're getting ahead<n>of
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But I do believe ours will make for a<n>historic race,
so please do look<n>forward to it.
